channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 2027 Is Shaping Up to Be a Great Year for Big Sci-Fi RPGs
item.description: Whether you're excited for 'Exodus' or 'The Expanse: Osiris Reborn,' it looks like RPG fans will be eating good next year.

item.title: J’ai essayé le BMW iX3, et je trouve qu’il n’a strictement rien à envier aux voitures électriques chinoises
item.description: Le BMW iX3 marque une nouvelle ère pour les voitures électriques de la marque : nouvelle plateforme, nouveau style, nouvelles batteries et nouveaux écrans, tout change ou presque. Cette avalanche de nouveautés et ses 805 km d’autonomie permettront-ils au SUV électrique de se faire une place au soleil ? Voici notre essai.

item.title: SXSW rebounds as a top networking, ideas festival for founders and VCs
item.description: SXSW made some changes this year, but some founders loved it all the same.

item.title: There is no ethical consumption of HBO’s Harry Potter series
item.description: In the coming years, HBO wants its new Harry Potter series to become "the streaming event of the decade" as it adapts each of the franchise's seven original books. The show could very well become a hit that captures the imaginations of a new generation of fans who weren't there for the first wave of […]

item.title: Yeti's new Throwback collection is my new obsession — here are my 6 favorite old-but-new pieces from the retro drop
item.description: The iconic cooler brand just got even — uh — cooler with old-school colors and retro slogans.

item.title: ‘I can't put it down’ — the Honor Magic 8 Pro Air is everything I hoped the iPhone Air and Galaxy S25 Edge would be, but aren't
item.description: After spending time with the Honor Magic 8 Pro Air, I'm hopeful for the future of thin phones.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A57 vs Samsung Galaxy A37: which mid-range phone is for you?
item.description: We compare the key features of the Samsung Galaxy A57 and cheaper Galaxy A37.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Monday, March 30 (game #1526)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Monday, March 30 (game #1023)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Monday, March 30 (game #757)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for March 29, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: Amazons Spring Sale is surprisingly good this year: We found 100+ deals on Apple, Kindle, Bose, and Ninja
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale runs until March 31. Take $100 off Apple Watch Series 11, 60% off Shark robot vacuums, and Kindles for $95.

item.title: We found the best Apple Watch deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale — deals start at $189
item.description: Check out the best Apple Watch deals to shop during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save $60 on the Apple Watch SE 2 while it's 24% off.

item.title: My beloved air fryer is down to a new best price ever during Amazons Spring Sale
item.description: My favorite air fryer, the Our Place Wonder Oven, is on sale for its best price ever in Amazon's Spring Sale.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for March 29, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: I test laptops for a living — here are the best MacBook deals from the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: We found the best MacBook deals at Amazon during the Big Spring Sale. Get a MacBook Neo for $689 and M4 MacBook Airs for $949, saving $250.

item.title: More images of the DJI Osmo Pocket 4 have leaked, and it looks as though a launch is imminent
item.description: It looks as though the DI Osmo Pocket 4 vlogging camera is finally going to go on sale next month.

item.title: J’ai acheté ce casque audio souvent en promo à moins de 30 € et il est surprennant (pour son prix)
item.description: Si vous recherchez un casque sans fil complet, avec réduction de bruit, Bluetooth multipoint et même de l'audio spatial, il faut souvent taper dans le haut du panier. Pourtant, le HiTune Max 5C de Ugreen fait tout ça pour moins de 30 euros. Arnaque ou vrai bon plan ?

item.title: ‘Leverage the local’: The fashion trend that explains why everyone around you is channeling their inner tourist
item.description: Apparel brands are capitalizing on the names of cities and neighborhoods near and far. Whether you’ve actually been to any of them is beside the point. Call it chic or call it cringe: Clothing that bears the name of a city near or far has become a closet staple for many consumers in recent years.

item.title: MSI Prestige 14 Flip AI+ Review: A Solid 2-in-1 Laptop With Some Glaring Flaws
item.description: It's the cheapest way to access Intel's exciting new CPUs. You'll just have to deal with a few pain points.

item.title: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale is a great time to get a fancy, AI-powered bird feeder
item.description: Bird feeders have come a long way since their inception in the early 1900s. These days, it’s not all that surprising to see feeders kitted out with cameras and solar roofs, two marquee features you’ll find on feeders from both BirdBuddy and Netvue. And while modern hoppers can command a pretty penny, Amazon’s Big Spring […]

item.title: Bridgerton season 5: everything we know about the Netflix show's return
item.description: Season 4 might have only just finished, but we already know whose love story is next. Here's everything we know so far about Bridgerton season 5 on Netflix.
